ads.author: Bill Dodd
ads.title: Original Tron Arcade Cabinet
ads.description: A very nice example of an original Tron Arcade Cabinet. Works great, it was a centerpiece of my arcade collection. The original Tron cabinets were typically melamine-coated 3/4" particle board in construction. Over the years as the arcade would shut down, staff were often less than careful mopping the sticky mess of an arcade floor and the bottoms of the cabinets would get some of the mop treatment. Over time, the MDF would soak up that moisture and degrade. This is one reason why so few of these games survived until today. This cabinet is one of the best I've seen but it isn't perfect, they seldom are. The boards got new ribbon cables and a once-over about 5 years ago and it has been rock solid. Available for pickup in Spanish Fort, Alabama. If you need to use a shipper, I can work with them to get it loaded up. Not interested in trades at this time. I also have a working Tempest (needs side art), an ArcadeSD powered Multi-DK with appropriate controls and new side art an Ice Cold Beer and a very nice Tapper.

The High Score arcade machines stand out because they are 100% custom-designed and built by a team in Tennessee with years of experience. No prebuilt templates or kits, no stock artwork. The High Score understands that making a machine as easy to operate as possible is essential for rental properties, game rooms, break rooms, and businesses. ads.author: Tim Timmins
ads.title: Dig Dug Video Arcade Game Machine ORIGINAL WORKING Atari Namco
ads.description: Here's an original Dig Dug arcade game - this is the REAL DEAL from back in the day! The game is running all original hardware and works fully, passing all self-tests and retaining all scores when turned off as it should. All buttons, switches, lights (yes, even the coin door lights) work. The cabinet has had wear around the edges and one area that was needed bondo as well. These areas were sanded, sealed and repainted. The t-molding was removed for this process, which was then cleaned and reinstalled. The black player-facing areas were all repainted and look perfect. The original sideart is all present and is in very good shape with no major gouges or defects. The marquee is original and in good shape. The original glass bezel artwork was stripped (flaking badly) and new repro reverse-printed artwork applied - looks a very nice-a. The control panel overlay is original and in very good shape, with only one small, tasteful cigarette burn in the upper right and some scuffing on the front. The panel itself was stripped of parts and the overlay cleaned with Awesome! and Magic Eraser to make those pinks and yellows really pop! The buttons and joystick were disassembled and cleaned. The bolts holding the joystick were also removed and burnished. The original coin door was disassembled, stripped and refinished and looks perfect! It can take quarters if you wish, as the coin box is present, but no locks are included. The original monitor has had the voltage properly adjusted and looks very good. Best thing is - IT'S BURN-FREE, a rarity for this title. Lastly, the original back door is included, with the instruction sheet AND the manual and schematics package. This is one of my favs - make it yours today! Cash and carry in Plano. Play before you pay. First floor, no stairs and I can help you load! :D

ads.author: Steve Larmon
ads.title: Atari Red Baron Vector Arcade Game Project
ads.description: Atari Red Baron Vector Arcade Game, with complete Boardset. This is a rare original game from 1979, its a good project for a vector game fan. Mostly complete, mostly in good condition. There is some cabinet damage at the lower back rear. This boardset is still in the cabinet, and appears to have never been removed. All screws and cable ties are still in place. Very clean, all original. No mold, no smell, no cigarette burns. Missing the monitor, marquee, foot rest, and some of the joystick handle pieces. Does have the back door, coin box with lid, owners manual and all service and schematics. Overlay is great, side art is good. Unable to test as the monitor is missing. $700 bucks Thanks Also... located in Chattanooga, available for pickup anytime or can help with shipping.
